key.name: cycle-tiled-top
key.description: Snap the focused window to the top of the screen and make it fill the top half. If already in the top half position, resize it to the [secondary-split]. If already in the top [secondary-split], resize it to the top [100 - secondary-split].

key.name: cycle-tiled-bottom
key.description: Snap the focused window to the bottom of the screen and make it fill the bottom half. If already in the bottom half position, resize it to the [secondary-split]. If already in the bottom [secondary-split], resize it to the bottom [100 - secondary-split].
